notes: BIOTECH + LIFE SCIENCES + PHARMACEUTICAL INNOVATION + DRUG DEVELOPMENT scan. 10 niches confirmed blue ocean. 0 duplicates filtered. Key finding: Biotech Investing (25/25) has the highest community (42.6M — WSB + investing subreddits active during PDUFA events), Drug Discovery Science (25/25) and Pharmacology Fundamentals (25/25) both max-score with zero streak app competitors. UNIQUE dynamic: biotech investing combines financial WTP with technical knowledge scarcity — users are spending real money on binary catalyst bets and desperately need pipeline analysis skills. The Osmosis/Sketchy gap: these cover USMLE pharmacology shallowly with mnemonics, not mechanistic depth. Clinical Trials (24/25) targets the ~50,000 CRAs in the US pursuing ACRP/SOCRA certifications — a $350/yr cert exam with zero dedicated streak learning apps. Regulatory Affairs (24/25) similarly serves ~25K RAC candidates. Biotech is unique: extreme depth required, professional certification stakes, AND direct financial ROI for investors. This creates three distinct paying user profiles with different price tolerance.
